summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (frontend goal limit removal) and REQ-2 (backend cap removal). The VisionBoard.tsx page description explicitly states unlimited goals with the Add Goal button always enabled. The backend main.mo is modified with a migration module added, and the file summaries confirm the limit has been removed entirely. Both requirements appear addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration between old and new actor state shapes.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to remove the goal count restriction without altering the data model or schema. Adding a migration module goes beyond what was requested, though it may be a structural side effect. It was not explicitly requested in any REQ.
